## Pull Request Template for Stardew Living Roots

Thank you for contributing to the Living Roots mod! Please follow this template when submitting your pull request.

### **Summary of Changes**
Briefly describe the changes made in this pull request. What problem does it solve or what feature does it add?

### **Type of Change**
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Refactoring (non-breaking change that improves code quality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Other (please describe)

### **Testing**
Describe how the changes have been tested:
- [ ] Manual testing in-game
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] Other tests (please describe)

If manual testing was performed, please explain what steps you took to verify the functionality.

### **Checklist**
Please confirm the following:
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) document
- [ ] My code follows the project's architecture principles (SOLID, TDD, DDD) as described in [ARCHITECTURE.md](ARCHITECTURE.md)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in complex areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation (if applicable)
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works (if applicable)
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes

### **Related Issues**
Link to any related issues this PR addresses (e.g., "Closes #XX", "Fixes #YY", "Resolves #ZZ").

### **Additional Context**
Add any other context or information about the pull request here. How does this change impact the agroecological philosophy of the mod?
